messages.content: Open Firefox

Opening Firefox for you.
<tool_call>{"name": "open_app", "arguments": {"name": "firefox"}}</tool_call>
Firefox is now launching.
Abre el navegador Firefox

Abriendo Firefox ahora mismo.
<tool_call>{"name": "open_app", "arguments": {"name": "firefox"}}</tool_call>
Firefox se está iniciando.
Open the file manager

Opening Nautilus file manager.
<tool_call>{"name": "open_app", "arguments": {"name": "nautilus"}}</tool_call>
Nautilus is now open.
Abre el editor de texto gedit

Abriendo gedit para ti.
<tool_call>{"name": "open_app", "arguments": {"name": "gedit"}}</tool_call>
gedit está listo para usar.
Open a terminal

Opening a terminal window.
<tool_call>{"name": "open_app", "arguments": {"name": "gnome-terminal"}}</tool_call>
Terminal is now open and ready.
Abre VLC para reproducir música

Abriendo VLC media player.
<tool_call>{"name": "open_app", "arguments": {"name": "vlc"}}</tool_call>
VLC está listo para reproducir tu música.
Launch the calculator

Opening GNOME Calculator.
<tool_call>{"name": "open_app", "arguments": {"name": "gnome-calculator"}}</tool_call>
Calculator is open.
Create a new folder called 'Projects' on the Desktop

Creating the 'Projects' folder on your Desktop.
<tool_call>{"name": "run_command", "arguments": {"command": "mkdir -p ~/Desktop/Projects"}}</tool_call>
The 'Projects' folder has been created on your Desktop.
Crea una carpeta llamada 'Documentos_2024' en el escritorio

Creando la carpeta 'Documentos_2024' en tu escritorio.
<tool_call>{"name": "run_command", "arguments": {"command": "mkdir -p ~/Desktop/Documentos_2024"}}</tool_call>
La carpeta 'Documentos_2024' ha sido creada en el escritorio.
Delete the file test.txt from my Downloads folder

Deleting test.txt from your Downloads folder.
<tool_call>{"name": "run_command", "arguments": {"command": "rm ~/Downloads/test.txt"}}</tool_call>
The file test.txt has been deleted from Downloads.
Move all PDF files from Downloads to Documents

Moving all PDF files from Downloads to Documents.
<tool_call>{"name": "run_command", "arguments": {"command": "mv ~/Downloads/*.pdf ~/Documents/"}}</tool_call>
All PDF files have been moved from ~/Downloads to ~/Documents.
Mueve todos los archivos .jpg de Descargas a Imágenes

Moviendo todos los archivos .jpg de Descargas a Imágenes.
<tool_call>{"name": "run_command", "arguments": {"command": "mv ~/Downloads/*.jpg ~/Pictures/"}}</tool_call>
Todos los archivos .jpg han sido movidos a tu carpeta de Imágenes.
Search for all files named 'report' in my home directory

Searching for files named 'report' in your home directory.
<tool_call>{"name": "run_command", "arguments": {"command": "find ~/ -name '*report*' -type f 2>/dev/null"}}</tool_call>
I'll display all matching files once the search completes.
Busca todos los archivos .log en /var/log

Buscando archivos .log en /var/log.
<tool_call>{"name": "run_command", "arguments": {"command": "find /var/log -name '*.log' -type f 2>/dev/null"}}</tool_call>
Aquí están todos los archivos .log encontrados en /var/log.
What processes are using the most CPU?

Checking the top CPU-consuming processes.
<tool_call>{"name": "run_command", "arguments": {"command": "ps aux --sort=-%cpu | head -10"}}</tool_call>
Here are the top 10 processes by CPU usage.
¿Cuánta memoria RAM está usando el sistema?

Verificando el uso de memoria RAM del sistema.
<tool_call>{"name": "run_command", "arguments": {"command": "free -h"}}</tool_call>
Aquí está el estado actual de la memoria RAM del sistema.
Kill the process with PID 1234

Terminating process with PID 1234.
<tool_call>{"name": "run_command", "arguments": {"command": "kill -9 1234"}}</tool_call>
Process 1234 has been terminated.
Mata el proceso de Firefox

Buscando y terminando el proceso de Firefox.
<tool_call>{"name": "run_command", "arguments": {"command": "pkill firefox"}}</tool_call>
El proceso de Firefox ha sido terminado.
Take a screenshot of my screen

Taking a screenshot of your screen now.
<tool_call>{"name": "take_screenshot", "arguments": {"filename": "screenshot_$(date +%Y%m%d_%H%M%S).png", "path": "~/Pictures/Screenshots"}}</tool_call>
Screenshot saved to ~/Pictures/Screenshots.
Toma una captura de pantalla y guárdala en el escritorio

Tomando una captura de pantalla y guardándola en el escritorio.
<tool_call>{"name": "take_screenshot", "arguments": {"filename": "captura_$(date +%Y%m%d_%H%M%S).png", "path": "~/Desktop"}}</tool_call>
Captura guardada en el escritorio.
Increase the volume to 80%

Setting system volume to 80%.
<tool_call>{"name": "run_command", "arguments": {"command": "pactl set-sink-volume @DEFAULT_SINK@ 80%"}}</tool_call>
Volume has been set to 80%.
Sube el volumen al máximo

Subiendo el volumen al 100%.
<tool_call>{"name": "run_command", "arguments": {"command": "pactl set-sink-volume @DEFAULT_SINK@ 100%"}}</tool_call>
El volumen está ahora al máximo.
Mute the system audio

Muting the system audio.
<tool_call>{"name": "run_command", "arguments": {"command": "pactl set-sink-mute @DEFAULT_SINK@ 1"}}</tool_call>
System audio is now muted.
Set brightness to 50%

Setting screen brightness to 50%.
<tool_call>{"name": "run_command", "arguments": {"command": "brightnessctl set 50%"}}</tool_call>
Brightness has been set to 50%.
Reduce el brillo de la pantalla al 30%

Reduciendo el brillo de la pantalla al 30%.
<tool_call>{"name": "run_command", "arguments": {"command": "brightnessctl set 30%"}}</tool_call>
El brillo de la pantalla ha sido reducido al 30%.
Connect to the WiFi network 'HomeNetwork'

Connecting to WiFi network 'HomeNetwork'.
<tool_call>{"name": "run_command", "arguments": {"command": "nmcli dev wifi connect 'HomeNetwork'"}}</tool_call>
Attempting to connect to HomeNetwork. You may be prompted for the password.
¿A qué red WiFi estoy conectado?

Verificando la conexión WiFi actual.
<tool_call>{"name": "run_command", "arguments": {"command": "nmcli -t -f active,ssid dev wifi | grep '^yes'"}}</tool_call>
Aquí está la información de tu conexión WiFi actual.
List all installed applications

Listing all installed applications on your system.
<tool_call>{"name": "run_command", "arguments": {"command": "dpkg --list | grep '^ii' | awk '{print $2}' | head -50"}}</tool_call>
Here are the installed packages on your system.
Install the 'htop' package

Installing htop system monitor.
<tool_call>{"name": "run_command", "arguments": {"command": "sudo apt install -y htop"}}</tool_call>
htop is being installed. You may need to enter your password.
Instala el paquete 'neofetch'

Instalando neofetch en tu sistema.
<tool_call>{"name": "run_command", "arguments": {"command": "sudo apt install -y neofetch"}}</tool_call>
neofetch está siendo instalado. Es posible que necesites ingresar tu contraseña.
Check my disk space usage

Checking disk space usage on your system.
<tool_call>{"name": "run_command", "arguments": {"command": "df -h"}}</tool_call>
Here is your current disk space usage.
¿Cuánto espacio libre tengo en el disco?

Verificando el espacio disponible en disco.
<tool_call>{"name": "run_command", "arguments": {"command": "df -h --output=target,avail | grep -v 'tmpfs\|udev'"}}</tool_call>
Aquí está el espacio libre disponible en tus particiones.
Open VS Code to edit my project in ~/Projects/myapp

Opening VS Code with your project.
<tool_call>{"name": "open_app", "arguments": {"name": "code", "args": "~/Projects/myapp"}}</tool_call>
VS Code is opening with your myapp project.
Abre el gestor de tareas del sistema

Abriendo el monitor del sistema GNOME.
<tool_call>{"name": "open_app", "arguments": {"name": "gnome-system-monitor"}}</tool_call>
El monitor del sistema está abierto.
Read the contents of /etc/hostname

Reading the hostname configuration file.
<tool_call>{"name": "read_file", "arguments": {"path": "/etc/hostname"}}</tool_call>
Here is the content of your hostname file.
Lee el archivo README.md en mi directorio de proyectos

Leyendo el archivo README.md.
<tool_call>{"name": "read_file", "arguments": {"path": "~/Projects/README.md"}}</tool_call>
Aquí está el contenido del archivo README.md.
Rename the file 'old_name.txt' to 'new_name.txt' in my Documents

Renaming the file in your Documents folder.
<tool_call>{"name": "run_command", "arguments": {"command": "mv ~/Documents/old_name.txt ~/Documents/new_name.txt"}}</tool_call>
File has been renamed from old_name.txt to new_name.txt.
Compress the Projects folder into a zip archive

Compressing the Projects folder into a zip archive.
<tool_call>{"name": "run_command", "arguments": {"command": "zip -r ~/Projects_backup_$(date +%Y%m%d).zip ~/Projects/"}}</tool_call>
Projects folder has been compressed into a zip archive in your home directory.
Comprime la carpeta Documentos en un archivo tar.gz

Comprimiendo la carpeta Documentos en un archivo tar.gz.
<tool_call>{"name": "run_command", "arguments": {"command": "tar -czf ~/Documentos_backup_$(date +%Y%m%d).tar.gz ~/Documents/"}}</tool_call>
La carpeta Documentos ha sido comprimida exitosamente.
Show me the network interfaces and their IP addresses

Displaying network interfaces and IP addresses.
<tool_call>{"name": "run_command", "arguments": {"command": "ip addr show"}}</tool_call>
Here are all network interfaces and their current IP addresses.
¿Cuál es mi dirección IP pública?

Obteniendo tu dirección IP pública.
<tool_call>{"name": "run_command", "arguments": {"command": "curl -s ifconfig.me"}}</tool_call>
Aquí está tu dirección IP pública.
Open Settings

Opening GNOME Settings.
<tool_call>{"name": "open_app", "arguments": {"name": "gnome-control-center"}}</tool_call>
GNOME Settings is now open.
Schedule a system reboot in 10 minutes

Scheduling a system reboot in 10 minutes.
<tool_call>{"name": "run_command", "arguments": {"command": "sudo shutdown -r +10"}}</tool_call>
System will reboot in 10 minutes. Use 'sudo shutdown -c' to cancel.
Reinicia el sistema ahora

Reiniciando el sistema.
<tool_call>{"name": "run_command", "arguments": {"command": "sudo reboot"}}</tool_call>
El sistema se está reiniciando.
Show system information (OS, kernel, CPU)

Gathering system information.
<tool_call>{"name": "run_command", "arguments": {"command": "uname -a && lsb_release -a && lscpu | grep 'Model name'"}}</tool_call>
Here is your system information.
Muestra información del sistema operativo

Mostrando información del sistema operativo.
<tool_call>{"name": "run_command", "arguments": {"command": "neofetch --stdout 2>/dev/null || uname -a && lsb_release -a"}}</tool_call>
Aquí está la información completa de tu sistema.
Open the Downloads folder in Nautilus

Opening the Downloads folder in Nautilus.
<tool_call>{"name": "open_app", "arguments": {"name": "nautilus", "args": "~/Downloads"}}</tool_call>
Nautilus is opening your Downloads folder.
Find all files larger than 100MB on my system

Searching for files larger than 100MB on your system. This may take a moment.
<tool_call>{"name": "run_command", "arguments": {"command": "find ~/ -type f -size +100M -exec ls -lh {} \; 2>/dev/null | sort -k5 -rh"}}</tool_call>
Here are the large files found on your system.
Encuentra todos los archivos duplicados en mi carpeta de Descargas

Buscando archivos duplicados en la carpeta de Descargas. Primero calcularé los hashes MD5 de todos los archivos.
<tool_call>{"name": "run_command", "arguments": {"command": "find ~/Downloads -type f -exec md5sum {} + | sort | awk 'a[$1]++{print $2}'"}}</tool_call>
Aquí están los archivos duplicados encontrados en tu carpeta de Descargas.
Open Spotify

Opening Spotify.
<tool_call>{"name": "open_app", "arguments": {"name": "spotify"}}</tool_call>
Spotify is launching.
Abre la aplicación de correo Thunderbird

Abriendo Thunderbird.
<tool_call>{"name": "open_app", "arguments": {"name": "thunderbird"}}</tool_call>
Thunderbird se está iniciando.
Create a new text file called 'notes.txt' on the Desktop with the content 'Meeting at 3pm'

Creating the notes.txt file on your Desktop.
<tool_call>{"name": "write_file", "arguments": {"path": "~/Desktop/notes.txt", "content": "Meeting at 3pm"}}</tool_call>
File 'notes.txt' has been created on your Desktop with the specified content.
Crea un script de bash que haga un backup diario de mis documentos

Creando un script de backup para tus documentos.
<tool_call>{"name": "write_file", "arguments": {"path": "~/scripts/backup_docs.sh", "content": "#!/bin/bash
# Script de backup diario
BACKUP_DIR="$HOME/Backups"
DATE=$(date +%Y%m%d)
mkdir -p "$BACKUP_DIR"
tar -czf "$BACKUP_DIR/docs_$DATE.tar.gz" ~/Documents/
echo "Backup completado: docs_$DATE.tar.gz""}}</tool_call>
Ahora haré el script ejecutable.
<tool_call>{"name": "run_command", "arguments": {"command": "chmod +x ~/scripts/backup_docs.sh"}}</tool_call>
El script de backup ha sido creado y configurado como ejecutable en ~/scripts/backup_docs.sh.
Update all installed packages

Updating all installed packages. This will first refresh the package list, then upgrade.
<tool_call>{"name": "run_command", "arguments": {"command": "sudo apt update"}}</tool_call>
Package list updated. Now upgrading packages.
<tool_call>{"name": "run_command", "arguments": {"command": "sudo apt upgrade -y"}}</tool_call>
All packages have been updated successfully.
Actualiza el sistema operativo

Actualizando el sistema operativo. Primero actualizaré la lista de paquetes.
<tool_call>{"name": "run_command", "arguments": {"command": "sudo apt update"}}</tool_call>
Lista actualizada. Ahora actualizando todos los paquetes.
<tool_call>{"name": "run_command", "arguments": {"command": "sudo apt full-upgrade -y"}}</tool_call>
El sistema ha sido actualizado correctamente.
Check if port 8080 is in use

Checking if port 8080 is currently in use.
<tool_call>{"name": "run_command", "arguments": {"command": "ss -tulnp | grep ':8080'"}}</tool_call>
Here is the result for port 8080.
¿Qué aplicaciones están escuchando en puertos de red?

Verificando qué aplicaciones están escuchando en puertos de red.
<tool_call>{"name": "run_command", "arguments": {"command": "ss -tulnp"}}</tool_call>
Aquí están todas las aplicaciones con puertos de red abiertos en tu sistema.
Set a cron job to run my backup script every day at midnight

Setting up a cron job to run your backup script daily at midnight.
<tool_call>{"name": "run_command", "arguments": {"command": "(crontab -l 2>/dev/null; echo '0 0 * * * ~/scripts/backup_docs.sh >> ~/scripts/backup.log 2>&1') | crontab -"}}</tool_call>
Cron job configured. Your backup script will run every day at midnight and log output to ~/scripts/backup.log.
Programa el script de limpieza para ejecutarse todos los domingos a las 2am

Configurando el cron job para ejecutar el script de limpieza cada domingo a las 2am.
<tool_call>{"name": "run_command", "arguments": {"command": "(crontab -l 2>/dev/null; echo '0 2 * * 0 ~/scripts/cleanup.sh >> ~/scripts/cleanup.log 2>&1') | crontab -"}}</tool_call>
Cron job configurado. El script de limpieza se ejecutará todos los domingos a las 2am.
